headlines.headline: Zelvel Capital explores strategic alternatives for digital payments unit

headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies reports record quarterly revenue, up 25% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Strong revenue growth of 25% is a clear positive indicator of market momentum and financial health.

sentiment.reasoning: Increased customer acquisition is a leading indicator of future revenue growth and market share expansion.

headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies to present at Corporate Strategy Symposium

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
